task: Implement p-retry exponential backoff and strict LangChain Runnable typings across all MidpointX LLM nodes

key_patterns_discovered: p-retry's AbortError must be explicitly imported and thrown inside the inner try/catch to differentiate deterministic 4xx failures (do not retry) from transient 429/503 failures (do retry). Simply re-throwing the error passes it back into the retry loop by default.

LangChain's Runnable<BaseLanguageModelInput, AIMessageChunk, any> is the correct strict return type for a factory that returns mixed provider models (ChatAnthropic, ChatOpenAI, ChatGoogleGenerativeAI) since all extend this base Runnable contract.

Jitter randomization via randomize: true in p-retry is critical when multiple MidpointX nodes hit the same free-tier endpoint simultaneously, preventing synchronized thundering herd 429 amplification.
